deep_dive.title: Emerging Flexible Designs for Geospatial Multimodal Foundation Models
deep_dive.abstract: Foundation models are rapidly transforming Earth observation by enabling scalable pretraining across diverse unlabeled geospatial modalities. However, their architectural diversity ranging from encoder-only to encoder-decoder and masked autoencoding paradigms makes it challenging to assess performance trade offs in a consistent manner. In this work, we present an apples-to-apples comparison of leading FM architectures designed for geospatial multimodal reasoning, with a particular focus on flexibility across varied spectral band configurations. We standardize pretraining using identical self supervised learning objectives and training datasets, and evaluate all models under consistent parameterization on the GEOBench benchmark across classification and segmentation tasks. Our results offer new insights into the design trade-offs between model flexibility, modality alignment, and downstream task performance. By highlighting architectural strengths and limitations under controlled conditions, this study provides practical guidance for building next generation geospatial foundation models capable of robust multimodal reasoning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Geospatial multimodal foundation models for remote sensing classification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 地理空间多模态基础模型用于遥感分类
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 地理空间多模态基础模型用于遥感分类
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 地理空间多模态基础模型用于遥感分类
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Compares flexible architectures for geospatial multimodal reasoning and evaluates on GEOBench benchmark for classification, directly supporting multimodal remote sensing classification tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有地理空间多模态基础模型架构多样性导致性能评估困难。本文在统一预训练条件下比较了多种编码器-解码器及掩码自编码范式，并在GEOBench基准上评估分类性能。结果表明不同架构在光谱带灵活性上存在权衡，为多模态遥感分类模型选择提供了指导。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有地理空间多模态基础模型架构多样性导致性能评估困难。本文在统一预训练条件下比较了多种编码器-解码器及掩码自编码范式，并在GEOBench基准上评估分类性能。结果表明不同架构在光谱带灵活性上存在权衡，为多模态遥感分类模型选择提供了指导。

quick_skim.title: FreqKD: Frequency-Decoupled Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Infrared Object Detection
quick_skim.abstract: Transfer learning from large-scale RGB foundation models to infrared (IR) imagery through knowledge distillation (KD) remains challenging due to fundamental differences in image formation physics. We investigate the spectral structure of the RGB--IR modality gap and observe that feature divergence is not uniform across spatial frequencies: low-frequency components (shape, layout) show greater cross-modal alignment than high-frequency components (texture, fine edges), which reflect modality-specific characteristics. Based on this analysis, we propose FreqKD, a frequency-decoupled distillation framework that applies asymmetric supervision adapted to each band's cross-modal consistency. The method employs strict mean squared error (MSE) on the low-frequency band to preserve shared structural information and a relaxed log-MSE loss (weighted at 0.1) on the high-frequency band to provide edge guidance while tolerating texture differences. Spectral divergence analysis on 500 paired samples shows that high-frequency divergence exceeds low-frequency divergence by a factor of 2.4x on average across all analysed transformer layers. On KAIST multispectral pedestrian detection, FreqKD achieves 64.1 mAP50, improving 2.4 points over the DINOv2 baseline. The learned representation transfers across datasets (FLIR ADAS, +2.1 mAP50), tasks (MFNet segmentation, +1.85 mean intersection-over-union), and architectures (ResNet-50, +1.0 mAP50). Code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/freq_decoupled_kd-5E5A
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: cross-modal knowledge distillation from RGB to infrared for object detection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从RGB到红外的跨模态知识蒸馏用于目标检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从RGB到红外的跨模态知识蒸馏用于目标检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从RGB到红外的跨模态知识蒸馏用于目标检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes FreqKD, a frequency-decoupled knowledge distillation framework that transfers RGB foundation models to infrared imagery by applying asymmetric supervision per frequency band, improving IR object detection.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对RGB与红外图像跨模态迁移困难的问题，提出频率解耦知识蒸馏方法FreqKD，通过分析光谱结构差异，对不同频率分量（低频形状/布局、高频纹理/边缘）施加非对称监督。在红外目标检测任务上，该方法有效缓解了模态差异，显著提升了检测精度，为多模态遥感中的跨模态学习提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对RGB与红外图像跨模态迁移困难的问题，提出频率解耦知识蒸馏方法FreqKD，通过分析光谱结构差异，对不同频率分量（低频形状/布局、高频纹理/边缘）施加非对称监督。在红外目标检测任务上，该方法有效缓解了模态差异，显著提升了检测精度，为多模态遥感中的跨模态学习提供了新思路。
